introSection: Comet was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Lincoln Park in North Dartmouth, Massachusetts, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Little Amerricka in Marshall, Wisconsin, USA purchased the Comet's trains.

After the ride's closure, it remained standing but not operating until it was demolished on July 11, 2012.

fullText:
Comet was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Lincoln Park in North Dartmouth, Massachusetts, USA.

Little Amerricka in Marshall, Wisconsin, USA purchased the Comet's trains.

After the ride's closure, it remained standing but not operating until it was demolished on July 11, 2012.
